name: Green in Snow Stir Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Broccoli head, cut into florets
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the sauce by combining sherry, soy sauce, ginger, and chicken broth.
2. Heat vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet.
3. Stir fry the vegetables for 3 to 4 minutes.
4. Add the sauce, sesame seeds, and mix together well.
5. Cover and steam/cook another 3 to 4 minutes until tender crisp.
6. Uncover and sprinkle with sesame oil.
7. Stir in the cornstarch mixture and cook about one minute more or until the sauce thickens.
8. Serve immediately.
